opik.description: Opik LLM observability - tracing, evaluation, and experiment tracking

_comments.usage: Copy the opik server config to your ~/.claude.json mcpServers section
_comments.cloud: Use 'opik' config with your API key from comet.com for Opik Cloud
_comments.self_hosted: Use 'opik-local' config for self-hosted Opik (adjust apiBaseUrl as needed)
